hero.title: Leading China Fastener Supplier for Africa
hero.subtitle: Quality fasteners from China to Africa — 12+ years specializing in African construction market. SABS-compliant IBR nails, roofing screws, and construction fasteners.

products.title: Our High-Quality Fastener Products
products.subtitle: ISO 9001 & SABS certified fasteners for construction & industrial applications. Export-quality drywall screws, IBR nails, hex bolts to Africa. Factory prices, low MOQ, sea freight to Durban, Lagos, Mombasa.

about.title: Why Choose TradeGo Fasteners?
about.experienceDesc: 12+ years specializing in Africa construction market. SABS-compliant products for South Africa, Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana, Tanzania, and 20+ African countries.
about.certificationDesc: ISO 9001:2015 certified. SGS/BV inspection available. Products meet SABS 1195, DIN, ANSI, ISO standards.
about.globalDesc: Specializing in Africa export. Serving South Africa, Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana, Tanzania, Zimbabwe, and 20+ African countries with sea freight delivery.
about.moqDesc: 1 ton MOQ with 24-hour quote response. Free samples available. Trial orders from 500kg welcome.

why.title: Why Choose TradeGo Fasteners?
why.subtitle: 12+ years specializing in Africa construction market. SABS-compliant products with fast response and reliable delivery.
why.experienceDesc: Specializing in African construction market since 2012. Products comply with SABS 1195 (South Africa), KEBS (Kenya), and Nigerian standards.
why.certDesc: ISO 9001:2015 certified. SGS/BV inspection available. Mill certificates provided with every shipment.
why.capabilityDesc: Cold heading, thread rolling, heat treatment & surface coating. 50,000+ tons annual capacity.
why.logisticsDesc: Specialized in sea freight to Durban (25-30 days), Lagos (30-35 days), Mombasa (28-32 days), and 20+ African ports.

testimonials.title: What Our African Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by construction companies in South Africa, Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana, Tanzania, Zimbabwe, and 15+ African countries.
testimonials.customer1: TradeGo's IBR nails are the best quality we've sourced from China. Consistent quality across 5 orders.
testimonials.customer2: Fast response and reliable delivery to Durban. Their SABS-compliant products save us inspection time.
testimonials.customer3: We've been ordering drywall screws and hex bolts for 3 years. TradeGo is our preferred China supplier.
